home.metaTitle: Spelltroum — Fast-Paced Mobile Multiplayer Battle Arena
home.metaDescription: Spelltroum is a free mobile battle arena game with 13 unique heroes, 30+ items, and quick skill-based matches. Play with friends on iOS and Android.
home.heroSubtitle: Upgrade spells, build powerful item combinations, and outsmart real players in fast-paced multiplayer arena battles.
home.feature1Desc: Explore powerful hero combinations that buff and complement each other. Choose from mages, archers, warriors, shamans and more — each with a unique playstyle.
home.feature2Desc: 30 items unlocked from the start. Build a personalized set of four items, experiment with combinations, and find the strategy that fits your hero and playstyle.
home.feature3Desc: Quick, skill-based matches on a dynamic arena. Farm resources, destroy bushes, collect runes, and dominate the battlefield before your opponents do.
home.discordDesc: Share strategies, give feedback to the devs, join content creator programs, and learn about new features before everyone else.
home.faqA1: A typical Spelltroum match lasts just 2–3 minutes. During a match, players farm bushes and resources, earn gold, upgrade abilities, purchase items, fight opponents, and compete for victory. Every match is a complete experience — fast, competitive, and rewarding.
home.faqQ2: Can I unlock all heroes for free?
home.faqA2: Yes. Every hero can be unlocked simply by playing the game. Most players can unlock any hero they want within a couple of days of regular play.
home.faqA3: Yes! You can team up with a friend and combine abilities for powerful combos. Whether you are playing solo or as a duo, every match is designed to be fast, competitive, and fun.
home.faqA4: No. Spelltroum is intentionally designed to avoid pay-to-win mechanics. Hero upgrades provide progression and customization, but they are not designed to create overwhelming power differences. Skill, teamwork, positioning, and decision-making matter far more than progression levels.
home.faqQ5: Can a new player beat a veteran player?
home.faqA5: Absolutely. Skill, teamwork, positioning, and decision-making have a much greater impact on match outcomes than progression. Upgrades are designed to provide relatively small advantages rather than determining the outcome of a match.
